site.title: sa/acc
hero.subtitle: Saudi Acceleration
hero.intro: > sa/acc (Saudi Acceleration) is a corner of the internet — and the real world — for builders, researchers, engineers, and AI enthusiasts in Saudi Arabia to communicate and build together.
meeting.label: Community Meeting
manifesto.1.title: Build
manifesto.1.body: We empower builders who use AI tools to create products, prototypes, and solutions. If you ship, you belong here.
manifesto.2.title: Research
manifesto.2.body: We support AI research happening in Saudi Arabia and by Saudi talent worldwide. Every paper, every model, every benchmark matters.
manifesto.3.title: Engineering
manifesto.3.body: We champion AI engineering — turning research into real systems. From training pipelines to production deployments, we build the infrastructure that powers the future.
manifesto.4.title: Share
manifesto.4.body: Open spaces for AI news, discoveries, tools, and techniques. What you learn here, you share here.
manifesto.5.title: Connect
manifesto.5.body: Virtual and real-world gatherings. We meet online and in-person across Saudi Arabia to grow the network.
manifesto.page.title: The sa/acc Manifesto
manifesto.page.preamble: sa/acc — Saudi Acceleration — is a grassroots movement to accelerate the development of artificial intelligence and technology in Saudi Arabia. We are not a company. We are not a government program. We are a community of builders, researchers, engineers, and enthusiasts who believe that the future of AI will be shaped by those who build it.
manifesto.page.section1.title: 01 — We believe in building
manifesto.page.section1.body: The world does not need more spectators. It needs builders. We empower anyone who uses AI tools to create products, prototypes, and solutions. We do not care about your title, your degree, or your employer. If you ship, you belong here. Building is the highest form of contribution. A working prototype is worth a thousand strategy decks. We celebrate those who write the code, train the models, and launch the products.
manifesto.page.section2.title: 02 — We believe in research
manifesto.page.section2.body: Breakthroughs do not happen by accident. They happen when talented people push the boundaries of what is known. We support AI research happening in Saudi Arabia and by Saudi talent worldwide. Every paper, every model, every benchmark matters. We believe Saudi Arabia has the talent, the resources, and the ambition to become a global center for AI research. This starts with supporting the researchers who are already doing the work.
manifesto.page.section3.title: 03 — We believe in engineering
manifesto.page.section3.body: Research without engineering is just theory. Engineering is the bridge between a breakthrough in a lab and a product in someone's hands. We champion AI engineering — the craft of turning research into real systems. From training pipelines to production deployments, from data infrastructure to model optimization, we build the infrastructure that powers the future. The engineer who deploys a model at scale is as important as the researcher who designed it.
manifesto.page.section4.title: 04 — We believe in sharing
manifesto.page.section4.body: Knowledge that stays locked up helps no one. We create open spaces to share AI news, discoveries, tools, and techniques. What you learn here, you share here. Open source, open knowledge, open collaboration. We believe progress accelerates when information flows freely. Every tutorial written, every tool open-sourced, every insight shared makes the entire ecosystem stronger.
manifesto.page.section5.title: 05 — We believe in connection
manifesto.page.section5.body: Technology is built by people, and people need community. We bring people together — online and in person. Virtual meetups, real-world gatherings, and everything in between. We meet across Saudi Arabia to grow the network, share ideas, and build relationships that last beyond any single project. The connections made here will shape the future of Saudi tech.
manifesto.page.closing.title: The future is being built now
manifesto.page.closing.body: sa/acc is not about changing policies or regulations. We are builders, not lobbyists. We are not waiting for permission. We are not waiting for perfect conditions. We are building now, with the tools we have, in the place we are. Saudi Arabia is accelerating. The question is not whether AI will transform this country — it is whether we will be the ones building that transformation. We choose to build.
